examples: One was an old Spaniard in a wide sombrero hat and the other was duty and unpleasant looking.
Why does the Sombrero Galaxy look like a hat?
A demitasse would fit his head like a sombrero.
Within six months 37 men and 3 women got tattoos of the sombrero-topped character astride a flying ear of corn.
